note: Block detail gains a 'slingshot' row that decodes the V12 tier-based bits_q drop. For blocks at height >= 7350 the explorer now shows: TIER N ACTIVE / -X.X% bits_q drop / mining_time vs threshold / what bits_q would have been without slingshot / how many bits_q units were saved. Tiers per include/sost/params.h: T1>1200s -6.5%, T2>1800s -12.5%, T3>3600s -25%, T4>7200s -37.5%, T5>10800s -50%. Pre-V12 blocks display N/A. Hard reload (Ctrl+Shift+R) if cached.
